name: Open Job Cards
query:
SELECT
    name,
    customer_name,
    device_type,
    status,
    assigned_technician,
    estimated_cost,
    creation
FROM
    `tabJob Card`
WHERE
    status NOT IN ('Delivered','Cancelled')
    AND (%(device_type)s IS NULL OR device_type = %(device_type)s)
ORDER BY
    creation DESC
